name: odoo-senior-engineer-pack
description: Multi-version Odoo senior engineer plugin pack — agent, skills, and slash commands distilled from Odoo official docs and OCA standards. One plugin per Odoo major version.

plugins.name: odoo-senior-engineer
plugins.description: Senior Odoo 17 engineer — 1 agent, 33 skills (technical + business domain), 13 slash commands. Tracks the 17.0 branch.
